title: This Is the Most Underrated Feature of Claude Code
author: Mark Kashef
summary:
Join My Community: https://www.skool.com/earlyaidopters/about

Prompts: https://markkashef.gumroad.com/l/claude-code-guide-5-levels

---

There's a sub-agent built into every single instance of Claude Code that most people don't know exists — and the ones who do barely scratch the surface. It's called the @claude-code-guide, and it acts like a personal concierge that knows every slash command, every hook, and every detail of how the latest versions of Claude Code work. In this video I walk you through 5 escalating levels of using it — from asking the most basic question all the way to having it self-heal broken parts of your existing repository.

---

Timestamps

00:00 - The Claude Code feature most people are missing
00:41 - What is @claude-code-guide and how does it work
01:20 - The demo project setup (intentionally broken)
02:10 - Level 1: Ask anything — basic questions answered instantly
03:49 - Level 2: Diagnose your CLAUDE.md — find out what's missing
05:14 - Level 3: Learn the hooks landscape — 17 hook types explained
06:24 - Level 4: Build — create a custom /standup slash command
07:34 - Level 5: Self-heal — fix broken hooks and rename garbage files
10:18 - What to do next

---

Book a Consultation: https://calendly.com/d/crfp-qz3-m4z
